title: Batch author loading in the article repository
prompt: The article feed returns the right data, but query-count profiling shows that it issues one author query per article. Diagnose the N+1 query in ArticleRepository.list_feed and replace the per-row author lookup with one batched author query. Preserve the existing tenant, publication, and minimum-score filtering; represent missing or inactive authors as null; retain the feed's stable published_at-descending/id-ascending order; and keep every repository query inside the existing read transaction without committing or rolling back a transaction owned by the caller. The standard-library test suite is protected; do not modify it. Verify with `python3 -B -m unittest discover -s tests -v` from the repository root.
